description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a combination of light gray and beige siding, with large windows on the front and rear facades allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn and is flanked by several large, leafy trees, providing shade and privacy. The front of the house includes a paved driveway leading up to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a small porch area and a decorative hedge. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard, visible through expansive glass doors. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist design, surrounded by trees and a green lawn. The front features a paved driveway and a small porch, while the rear opens to a private backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, porch, decorative hedge, and two large trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, large rear windows, and the open-plan interior layout visible through the glass.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, flat roof, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side yard, additional trees, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a small porch, paved walkway, and decorative hedge, no overhang or columns
